name: SafeSpace Global Corp
summary: PART I . SafeSpace Global Corporation (collectively the Company, we, our or us) is a multimodal AI technology solutions company with a dedicated team focused on driving safety innovation across multiple industries. We are currently marketing products and solutions that utilize advanced AI tools to monitor and enhance resident safety, reduce the risk of injuries, and improve overall care efficiency. In April 2025, we completed a strategic rebranding initiative, adopted our current corporate name ...
